name: Russo-Ukrainian War
note: The largest conventional land war in Europe since WWII.

name: 2026 Iran War
note: US-Israeli strikes on Iran triggered a regional war; a fragile ceasefire holds since June 2026.

name: Gaza War
note: War in the Gaza Strip since October 2023.

name: Israel–Hezbollah
note: Cross-border fighting on the Israel–Lebanon front that escalated to the 2026 Lebanon war.

name: Sudan Civil War
note: War between the Sudanese Armed Forces and the Rapid Support Forces, driving one of the world's worst displacement crises.

name: Myanmar Civil War
note: Nationwide armed resistance since the 2021 military coup.

name: Yemeni Civil War
note: Protracted civil war; Houthis also strike Red Sea shipping and Israel.

name: Syrian Conflict
note: Fragmented violence after the 2024 fall of the Assad regime.

name: Mali Insurgency
note: Jihadist insurgency across the central Sahel.

name: Burkina Faso Insurgency
note: One of the world's deadliest jihadist insurgencies.

name: Niger Insurgency
note: Sahel and Lake Chad-basin militancy.

name: Eastern DR Congo (M23)
note: M23 offensive across North and South Kivu.

name: Somali Civil War
note: Long-running insurgency by al-Qaeda-aligned Al-Shabaab.

name: Nigeria Insurgency
note: Jihadist insurgency in the north-east plus widespread banditry.

name: Ethiopia Conflicts
note: Insurgencies in the Amhara and Oromia regions.

name: Mexican Drug War
note: Sustained conflict between the state and powerful drug cartels.

name: Haiti Gang Conflict
note: Armed gangs control much of Port-au-Prince.

name: Cabo Delgado Insurgency
note: Jihadist insurgency in northern Mozambique.

name: Pakistan Insurgencies
note: Militancy by the Pakistani Taliban and Baloch separatists.

name: Afghanistan (ISKP)
note: Insurgency against Taliban rule.

name: Colombian Conflict
note: Decades-long conflict with remaining guerrilla and criminal groups.

name: Anglophone Crisis
note: Separatist conflict in Cameroon's English-speaking regions.

name: Libyan Crisis
note: Fragile standoff between rival administrations.

name: Iraq (ISIS remnants)
note: Residual ISIS insurgency and militia activity.

name: Central African Republic
note: Long-running civil war with foreign security support.

name: South Sudan Conflict
note: Recurring civil conflict and intercommunal violence.

name: Naxalite Insurgency
note: Long-running Maoist insurgency in eastern India.

name: Kashmir Conflict
note: Disputed region with periodic interstate flare-ups.

name: Philippine Insurgencies
note: Communist and Islamist insurgencies in Mindanao.

name: Western Sahara
note: Frozen conflict reignited since 2020.

name: Armenia–Azerbaijan
note: Tensions persist after the 2023 fall of Nagorno-Karabakh.

name: Israel–West Bank
note: Escalating raids and clashes across the West Bank.

name: Turkey–PKK
note: Decades-long insurgency now in a fragile peace process.
